forecast-period.text: Mostly clear. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the late afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending east to northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly clear. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:10am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Becoming cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h shifting west to southwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Slight chance of a shower in the early morning. Sunny day. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the middle of the day then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day then becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early morning then tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 32.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Hawker, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the morning then turning east to northeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 33.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Ceduna. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly in the evening then becoming light in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding west of Nullarbor. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the middle of the day then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 31.

Cloudy. High chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly during the day then tending northeast to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late evening.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then shifting south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending north to northeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower in the far west, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly in the late afternoon.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west from the late morning. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 36.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the early afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the day then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 36.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly during the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 31 to 37.
Clear. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 36.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:10am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon then tending east to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 36.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly during the day then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 37.
